name: Augusta Resource Corporation
description: Augusta Resource Corporation was a Canadian junior mineral exploration and development company. The company's primary asset was the Rosemont Copper project, a large copper-molybdenum-silver deposit located in Pima County, Arizona. Augusta Resource focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in the Americas. In 2014, the company was acquired by Hudbay Minerals Inc. after a hostile takeover bid, which was subsequently supported by Augusta's board of directors.
